item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:measure","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering only yields unspecific likeness to a commonly known thing, not a size/amount determined against an adopted standard; add that criterial standard-comparison/result and revise the lossiness note."}
